sentences.en: Our bathroom sink stopped draining properly this week, so Dad declared it was time for a proper do-it-yourself repair weekend.
sentences.zh: 我們浴室的洗手台這星期排水不順，所以爸爸宣布這個週末要來一場正式的DIY修理大作戰。

sentences.en: Mom warned him that a sink repair sounded a little dangerous without real training, but Dad insisted he had watched enough videos online.
sentences.zh: 媽媽警告他沒受過訓練就修水槽聽起來有點危險，但爸爸堅持說他已經看過夠多線上教學影片了。

sentences.en: He put on an old shirt, grabbed a mask to keep out dust, and said hello to the pile of tools like they were old friends.
sentences.zh: 他穿上一件舊襯衫，戴上一個防塵口罩，還跟那堆工具打招呼，好像它們是老朋友一樣。

sentences.en: Underneath the sink, Dad found a mass of hair blocking the pipe, which explained why the water flow had slowed to almost nothing.
sentences.zh: 水槽下面，爸爸發現一大團頭髮堵住了水管，這也解釋了為什麼水流幾乎慢到停了。

sentences.en: William, both fascinated and a little scared, watched from a safe distance and asked if the pipe was actually a secondary sewer for the entire house.
sentences.zh: 既著迷又有點害怕的 William，從安全距離外看著，問這根水管是不是整棟房子的次要下水道。

sentences.en: Dad explained the basics of how the plumbing works, though I will admit I only understood about half of it.
sentences.zh: 爸爸解釋了水管基本的運作原理，不過老實說我大概只聽懂一半。

sentences.en: He measured the pipe's depth with a small ruler, checking whether a new part would fit without buying the wrong size.
sentences.zh: 他用一把小尺量了水管的深度，確認新的零件裝得下去，不會買錯尺寸。

sentences.en: At one point, Dad twisted his neck at an awkward angle and complained his whole upper body felt sore for the rest of the day.
sentences.zh: 有一度，爸爸的脖子扭到一個很不自然的角度，抱怨接下來一整天他整個上半身都很痠痛。

sentences.en: Mom brought him an ice pack and said, quite fairly, that this is exactly why professionals exist for domestic repairs.
sentences.zh: 媽媽拿了一個冰袋給他，相當公平地說，這正是為什麼專業人士存在來處理居家修繕。

sentences.en: Dad refused to give up, saying it takes real nerve to try something new, and half the fun of a hobby is not being perfect at it.
sentences.zh: 爸爸拒絕放棄，說要嘗試新事物需要真正的勇氣，而一項嗜好一半的樂趣就在於不完美。

sentences.en: After nearly two hours, the new pipe part finally fit, and the water flow increased back to completely normal within seconds.
sentences.zh: 將近兩小時後，新的水管零件終於裝上了，水流幾秒鐘內就完全恢復正常了。

sentences.en: William cheered like Dad had just won a national competition, and honestly, in that exact moment, it kind of felt that way.
sentences.zh: William 歡呼得好像爸爸剛贏了一場全國比賽一樣，老實說，在那個當下，感覺還真有點像。

sentences.en: Dad said the whole ordeal cost him less than the price of calling a repair service, so technically, it was a pretty good deal.
sentences.zh: 爸爸說整件事花的錢比找修繕服務便宜多了，所以嚴格來說，這筆交易還算划算。

sentences.en: Sophia, watching from the doorway the whole time, said the real lesson here has nothing to do with pipes at all: sometimes trying is worth it, even if you get a little tired and sore.
sentences.zh: 全程從門口看著的 Sophia 說，這件事真正的教訓其實跟水管一點關係都沒有：有時候嘗試本身就值得，就算會有點累、有點痠。

quiz.question: What was blocking the bathroom pipe?
What does Mom bring Dad after he hurts his neck?
According to Dad, why was fixing it himself a good deal?
options: It cost less than calling a repair service.
It took less time than expected.
